synopsis:
Luke Skywalker, Leia Organa, Han Solo, and Dani, together with a mixed team of commandos and their new Imperial and Nagai allies Knife and Den Siva, attack the Tof-held world of Saijo, site of the Tof field headquarters. The Nagai have revealed that the Tof prince Sereno, leader of the invasion, is there, and the team hopes to take him hostage and force a Tof surrender.

Infiltrating the Tof administrative palace, the men posing as prisoners and Dani and Leia disguised as veiled Tof ladies, they find not only Prince Sereno but also the Dark Lady Lumiya, who has thrown in with the Tof. As the attack begins, Tof fighters called up from the bulkship *Merriweather* are intercepted by Rogue Squadron under Wedge Antilles and by the *Millennium Falcon*, flown by Lando Calrissian and Chewbacca. Knife is wounded by Lumiya, and Leia's intervention draws Lumiya's fire before Leia is herself shot in the back by a Tof officer and left for dead, though she survives. Luke captures the reluctant Sereno, and the Tof turncoat aiding them is revealed to be Bey, long working undercover. As the fighting ends, Luke voices hope that the many factions and species allied against the Tof might one day coexist in peace.
title: Star Wars (1977) #107: All Together Now
